title: La ragazza in vetrina
writer: Rodolfo Sonego, Luciano Emmer, Vinicio Marinucci
actors: Lino Ventura, Magali Noël, Marina Vlady
plot: Italians migrate to Holland to make money in coal mining. After their first work accident, two friends make different future plans: one spends money on a weekend holiday; the other determines to return to Italy soon.
